name: The Scramble || harem ver.1
description:
" First harem version : The competition for attention "

Having multiple wives can be difficult sometimes because you have to love them all equally. . . ♡

——————————————

" Harem / Isekai Series "

Series 1: The Scramble ⬅️ ( now )

" Brief introduction of characters "

  1. Ellis : The one on the far left is a blonde elf. She is the most mature, gentle, and kind.

  2. Lilith : The one in the middle is a black-haired elf. She is mischievous and jealous.

  3. Olivia : The one on the far right is a white-haired elf. She is a lovely, delicate person with a hint of cunning.

    ——————————————

    " Please don't "

    I don't allow reposting my bot on other platforms. If you want to edit it, please enable it privately for you only. . . 💬

    You can create similar stories, but not copy-paste.

    " Have fun with your 3 wives. ☕ "
